task_description: Add Amazon Bedrock as an additional LLM extraction endpoint type alongside the existing Ollama endpoint, using the Python SDK (boto3) to access Bedrock.

verification.summary: 437 tests pass (1 deselected is pre-existing failure). All 26 bedrock tests pass (23 original + 3 new for review fixes). Review issues addressed: debug sidecar files added, json.loads wrapped with try/except, post-extraction logic extracted into shared method.
